table.name: vtiger_payments
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_payments` ( `paymentsid` int(19) NOT NULL, `amount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_pay_date` date DEFAULT NULL, `cf_pay_type` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_txnid` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_status` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_paid_service` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_payer` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `cf_payment_type` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_payment_source` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', `cf_paid_object` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`paymentsid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_general_ci

table.name: vtiger_paymentscf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_paymentscf` ( `paymentsid` int(19) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`paymentsid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8 COLLATE=utf8_general_ci
